title: ISic030052. Contract for the sale of property
body:
Text encoding: Randall Souza
1[бјҳПҖбҪ¶ .]
2[бҪҒ ОҙОөбҝ–ОҪОұ бјҗПҖПҒОҜОұП„Оҝ П„бҪёОҪ ПҮбҝ¶ПҒОҝОҪ.]
3[.ОәОұбҪ¶ П„бҝ¶ОҪ бјҗОҪОөПҢОҪП„ПүОҪ ОәОҝО№ОҪПүОҪ .]
4[--- ПҖОҝП„бҪ¶] ОҡПҢП„Оұ[ОҪ? ---]
5[---] ОәОұбҪ¶ П„ОҝбҝҰ бҪ•ОҙОұП„Оҝ[ПӮ ---]
6[П„бҪ° бјҘОјО№ПғПғОұ бјҗ]ОҪ П„бҝ¶О№ ПҮПҺПҒПүО№ Оі[---]
7[--- ПҖбҪ°ПҒ? ОҰО№]ОҪП„ОӯОұ П„[Оҝ]бҝҰ ОңОұПҮО¬ОҪ[ОҝП… ---]
8[---]П„бҪ°ОҪ ОҙвҖҷ О•бҪҗО¬ОјОөПҒ[ОҝПӮ? ---]
9[---П„ОұО»О¬ОҪП„Пү]ОҪ бјҢОјПҖОҝПҮ[ОҝО№ ---]
10[вҒҰ - - - - - - - - - - вҒ©]

Text encoding: Randall Souza
1[...В·]
2[.....................В·]
3[В·....................В·]
4[---....]ОҡОҹОӨО‘[.---]
5[---]ОҡО‘ОҷОӨОҹОҘОҘО”О‘ОӨОҹ[.---]
6[.........]ОқОӨО©ОҷО§О©ОЎО©ОҷО“[---]
7[---.....]ОқОӨО•О‘ОӨ[.]ОҘОңО‘О§О‘Оқ[..---]
8[---]ОӨО‘ОқО”О•ОҘО‘ОңО•ОЎ[..---]
9[---.......]ОқО‘ОңО ОҹО§[..---]
10[вҒҰ - - - - - - - - - - вҒ©]

Facsimile Images

Apparatus criticus

  • Text based on Manganaro in Parola del Passato 1989, corrected from photo in Cordano 1984;
  • 4: Perhaps [....]ОәПҢП„Оұ, an accusative participle referring to the seller's possession of the property in question?
  • 5: ОәОұ[.], M., but the iota is clearly visible in the photo.
  • 6: П„бҝ¶, M., but the iota is clearly visible in the photo.
  • 7: [.]бҪҗО¬ОјОөПҒ[..?], M., but the epsilon is clearly visible in the photo.

English translation

Randall Souza

...Kotas(?)...and the water...in the land...and the...of Euameros...talents. Guarantors:...

commentary

Tiny fragment, but the unambiguous reference to guarantors (бјҢОјПҖОҝПҮОҝО№) suggests this is an independent contract and not to be joined with another existing text. It is written in the same hand as ISic 030051.

bibliography

  • 27.0651 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000796
  • Manganaro 1977 1344-1349 https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10001410
  • Manganaro 1989 191 Kam. II https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10002637
  • Dubois 1989 p.137 dr https://biblio.inscriptiones.org/epig10000187

Lunate sigma, small omicron, one-stroke upsilon (Dubois in IGDS). Also dotted theta and one-stroke omega.

3 not recorded
Licensed under a Creative Commons-Attribution 4.0 licence
